description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a vibrant pink and purple leopard print canvas upper, complemented by white laces and a white rubber toe cap. The shoe has a classic silhouette with a rounded toe and a flat, thick white rubber sole that includes a black stripe detail along the side. The lacing system is standard, with metal eyelets and white laces threaded in a criss-cross pattern. The interior appears to be lined with a light beige or pinkish material, providing comfort and contrast to the bold exterior. The back of the shoe displays subtle branding embossed on the heel tab, and the outsole is slightly textured for grip. Overall, the shoe is clean, well-constructed, and visually striking, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A high-top sneaker with a pink and purple leopard print canvas upper, white laces, and a thick white rubber sole with black detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full leopard print canvas, white laces, and black stripe on the sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded white toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and symmetrical shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible eyelets and the same bold leopard print pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel tab with embossed branding and the continuous leopard print.
